scripts.lint:pwa: echo 'PLACEHOLDER: PWA lint not yet configured - add ESLint to apps/pwa to enable'
scripts.typecheck:pwa: echo 'PLACEHOLDER: PWA typecheck not yet configured - add tsc to apps/pwa to enable'
scripts.test:pwa: echo 'PLACEHOLDER: PWA tests not yet configured - add vitest to apps/pwa to enable'
scripts.format: echo 'PLACEHOLDER: format not yet configured - add biome or prettier to apps/mobile to enable'
scripts.dev:pwa: npm --prefix apps/pwa install && npm --prefix apps/pwa run dev
scripts.build:mobile: npm --workspace apps/mobile run build && npm run sync:mobile
scripts.build:pwa: npm --prefix apps/pwa install && npm --prefix apps/pwa run build
